## Meeting Purpose

[Explore AI-driven content and SEO strategies for Appfolio with growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai offers AI-powered content creation and SEO optimization, focusing on external-facing content to prove ROI](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Their approach involves creating interconnected prompts and outputs ("artifacts") that feed into each other, enabling scalable content generation](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Appfolio sees potential in using these tools to expand non-branded web traffic and educate on new generic terms in their market](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Security and data sharing concerns exist but are mitigated by growthx.ai's use of only publicly available data](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)

## Topics

### growthx.ai's Capabilities and Approach

  - [Uses AI to automate content creation, SEO, and market research processes](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Creates workflows that mimic thought processes of top team members](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Employs a "strategy sprint" approach (4-8 weeks) to tailor solutions to client needs](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Utilizes a team of experienced managing directors (e.g., former TechCrunch, Shopify executives)](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Focuses on external content to prove ROI, but can also develop internal artifacts (personas, messaging, style guides)](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)

### Content Creation and SEO Strategies

  - [Identifies gaps in existing content and opportunities for updates (e.g., outdated blog posts)](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [Creates comprehensive content hubs (e.g., landlord resources including state-specific information)](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Develops fact-checking processes to ensure accuracy, especially for location-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)
  - [Repurposes existing content (e.g., turning podcasts into enriched articles)](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
  - [Aims to increase non-branded organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)

### Competitive Analysis and Research

  - [Conducts in-depth competitor analysis using AI-driven research tools](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Compiles detailed reports from hundreds of sources, adhering to specific research rules (e.g., using only government sources when required)](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [Utilizes multiple APIs and citation quality checks to ensure reliable information](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)

### Potential Applications for Appfolio

  - [Expand content strategy to capture more non-branded traffic](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
  - [Develop educational content around new generic terms specific to Appfolio's market](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [Create state and locality-specific content, addressing compliance issues](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [Augment existing AI and content teams' capabilities through collaboration with growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=1558.0)

### Security and Data Concerns

  - [growthx.ai primarily uses publicly available data, addressing most security concerns](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)
  - [Potential for Appfolio to use parts of growthx.ai's system locally for handling private information](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=1965.0)
  - [Non-disclosure agreements in place for any strategy-related information sharing](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=1948.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Lisa to discuss potential collaboration with her team](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=2120.0)
  - [Consider setting up a strategy project to explore specific applications for Appfolio](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=2120.0)
  - [Plan a follow-up session with a broader group from Appfolio's team (ops, AI, content, digital)](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=2245.0)
  - [Explore the possibility of an on-site meeting in Santa Barbara](https://fathom.video/share/6FmpjtRX_fuBSwRMukHBhmu4fZBRwinC?tab=summary&timestamp=2380.0)
